v0.1.0.description:
# Outdated - You probably want the [latest version](https://github.com/soopercool101/Archipelago/releases/latest)

[Mod](https://github.com/soopercool101/YellowTaxiAP/releases/tag/v0.1.0) | [Setup Guide](https://github.com/soopercool101/Archipelago/blob/v0.1.0/worlds/yellowtaxi/docs/setup_en.md)

## Initial Release
- Contains the following levels:
  - Hub (Morio's Lab/Granny's Island)
  - Morio's Home
  - Bombeach
  - Gym Gears
  - Fecal Matters
  - Mosk's Rocket
v0.1.0.title: Yellow Taxi Goes Vroom APWorld ALPHA v0.1.0

## v0.1.1
- Logic fixes
  - Fix Crash Again not properly expecting Full Game Unlock
  - Fix Shortcut Pipe to Observatory Room being considered in non-expert logic
  - Add alternate path to upper floors for non-expert logic

v0.1.3.description:
[Mod](https://github.com/soopercool101/YellowTaxiAP/releases/tag/v0.1.0) | [Setup Guide](https://github.com/soopercool101/Archipelago/blob/v0.1.3/worlds/yellowtaxi/docs/setup_en.md)

## v0.1.3
- Add Coinsanity Percentage setting, which allows for a percentage of coins to become checks, rather than all or nothing
  - Capped by two new host.yaml settings, one controlling the max percentage of coins that can be checks (default 100%), and one controlling the max percentage of coins that can be non-filler (default 5%).
    - The old host.yaml setting has been deprecated and will no longer be used

## v0.1.2
- Fix expert logic issue where it would be expected to talk to Morio in the Dream Machine before Full Game Unlock is received

## v0.1.1
- Logic fixes
  - Fix Crash Again not properly expecting Full Game Unlock
  - Fix Shortcut Pipe to Observatory Room being considered in non-expert logic
  - Add alternate path to upper floors for non-expert logic

## Initial Release
- Contains the following levels:
  - Hub (Morio's Lab/Granny's Island)
  - Morio's Home
  - Bombeach
  - Gym Gears
  - Fecal Matters
  - Mosk's Rocket
v0.1.3.title: Yellow Taxi Goes Vroom APWorld ALPHA v0.1.3
